_notes: Each city is synced from the events-management Convex deployment via /cms-snapshot/*?city=<slug>.
The sync iterates over cities[] and writes one folder per slug under data/.
Set `active: false` to keep a city in the config but skip its sync (useful for cities that haven't launched yet but you want pre-defined).
Add new cities by appending to the array — no code changes needed. The city must also exist in the events-management cities table with content scoped to it.
